title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.1000 - Definition
text:
105.1000.  Definition. — As used in sections 105.1000 to 105.1020, the term "employee" means any person, including elected or appointed officials, receiving compensation from the state, city, county, or other political subdivision for services rendered, including salaried persons.
(L. 1993 H.B. 882 § 1 subsec. 1)
